playbook.intent: Inbound request outside agreed scope. Done = either a written change order with new price/timeline, or a polite deferral to next sprint, with no silent absorption.
playbook.scope: Inbound request outside agreed scope. Done = either a written change order with new price/timeline, or a polite deferral to next sprint, with no silent absorption.

success-criteria.criterion: Triage stage complete: Triage decision note
Talk stage complete: Conversation outcome note

stage.name: Triage
stage.intent: Decide whether ask is in-scope, change-order, or defer.
stage.decision-gate: Refuse to start work until triage outcome is written.

stage.name: Talk
stage.intent: Have the conversation: change-order or graceful defer.

tasks.task: Open with what you heard them ask
Present effort delta + price + timeline impact
Land on change-order, defer, or no-thanks

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written outcome. No silent absorption.

stage.name: Document
stage.decision-gate: Work does not start until amendment is countersigned.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']
{human: faion get-content scope-change-conversation --format md, agent: faion get-content scope-change-conversation --format context, json: faion get-content scope-change-conversation --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
